tasks.label: Run Flutter Web Release
tasks.command: flutter build web --release && npx http-server build/web -p 8080

tasks.label: docker: Build and Run Release
tasks.command: flutter build web --release && docker build -t my-flutter-app . && docker run -d -p 8085:80 --name flutter-container my-flutter-app
tasks.detail: Builds Flutter, creates Docker image, and starts container.

tasks.label: Git Source Control, Docker: Build and Run Release
tasks.command: git add . && git commit -m 'automated backup' && git push && flutter build web --release && docker build -t my-flutter-app . && docker run -d -p 8085:80 --name flutter-container my-flutter-app
tasks.detail: Git Source Control, Builds Flutter, creates Docker image, and starts container.
